creator: murphyp1@ais.msu.edu
text:
I am trying to update my Alpha 2100A/250 from 4.4-RC, which has been running fine, to 5.0-CURRENT (from cvsup of 09/01/2001).  The machine has three processors, and I am trying to test out the SMP support for it.  When I boot the new 5.0-CURRENT kernel it aborts with the following captured output:

syncing disks...
done
Uptime: 4d15h18m30s
Rebooting...

halted CPU 0

halt code = 5
HALT instruction executed
PC = fffffc00005c7790

CPU 0 booting

waiting for drb.0.0.6.0 to start...
